cmd.unknown: ❓ Unknown command. Use /start to open the menu.
cmd.default_private: 💬 Use /start to open the menu or send a message link for moderation.
mod.user_new: 🆕 NEW USER: this author's first message was seen within the new-user window — apply extra scrutiny to first-time posters.
mod.user_reputation_suspicious: ⚠️ This profile was flagged as SUSPICIOUS by automated screening — treat the author with extra caution.
mod.user_profile_suspicious: 🚩 SUSPICIOUS PROFILE: automated screening flagged this user's profile (photo, bio and/or linked channel). Weigh this when moderating.
mod.username_reuse_muted_priors: ⚠️ Username @%s was previously used by %d other account(s) with a mute history in this chat (%d mute(s) total): %s. Same handle, different person — take with caution.
profile.digest_annotation_warned: ⚠️ USER WAS WARNED FOR THIS MESSAGE
profile.digest_annotation_muted: 🔇 USER WAS MUTED FOR THIS MESSAGE
profile.digest_moderation_stats: Moderation stats (%s): %d warnings, %d mutes, %d cleared (not a violation)
mod.report_auto_deleted:
🚨 %s
🗑️ Message auto-deleted

👤 User: %s
💬 Chat: %s

%s

💬 Deleted message text:
"%s"
mod.complaint:
🚨 Complaint about a message from %s:

"%s"

%s

Choose an action:
warn.already_exists: ⚠️ Warning already exists for this message (attempt by %s)
warn.fallback: ⚠️ Warning: Your message violates the chat rules. Please be civil, polite and respectful to other members. This is a warning — next time a more serious punishment may follow.
warn.admin_notify:
⚠️ Warning sent to %s by %s
🔗 Original message: %s
automod.notify_delete: 🗑️ Auto-deleted message from %s — triggered by rule %s
automod.notify_warn:
⚠️ Auto-warned %s — triggered by rule %s
🔗 Original message: %s
automod.notify_mute:
🔇 Auto-muted %s for %d min — triggered by rule %s
🔗 Original message: %s
mod.content_security_details: Azure content safety filter detected inappropriate content
mod.reply_context:
--- CONTEXT (do NOT moderate this) ---
The message under review is a reply to this earlier message from %s:
"%s"
--- END CONTEXT ---
profile.screening_photo_flagged: ⚠️ New member's %s was flagged by content safety
mute.admin_notify:
🔇 %s muted for %d minutes by %s
🔗 Original message: %s
mute.confirm_dialog:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to mute %s %s?

This is a serious action!
mute.cancelled:
🚨 Moderation cancelled — choose an action

👤 User: %s
📍 Chat: %s
📝 Message: %d
cmute.admin_notify: 😈 %s cruel-muted for %d minutes by %s (messages will be auto-deleted)
cmute.confirm_dialog:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to cruel-mute %s %s?

The user will not be officially restricted, but every message they send will be auto-deleted.
cmute.offer_after_failure:
⚠️ Failed to mute %s normally:
%s

You can apply a *cruel mute* instead — the user will not be officially restricted, but every message they send will be auto-deleted.
webui.otp_text:
🔐 *Web UI access code*

```
%s
```

⏰ Valid for 5 minutes
🔗 Open Web UI and enter this code
startup.notify:
🚀 @%s is up and running

Version: %s
Built: %s
muted.empty: ✅ No muted users at the moment.
muted.title: 🔇 Muted users:
actions.title: 📋 Recent moderation actions:
top10.title: 🏆 TOP-10 violators in the last 24 hours:
top10.empty: ✅ No violations in the last 24 hours!
delete.error_cant_delete: ⚠️ Message %d in chat %s cannot be deleted (possibly too old or already deleted)
delete.error_already_deleted: ⚠️ Message %d in chat %s was already deleted
delete.error_generic: ❌ Failed to delete message %d in chat %s: %v
delete.admin_notify:
🗑️ Message deleted from %s by %s
🔗 Was at: %s
restore.error_not_found: ❌ Could not restore message %d: data not found in database
restore.error_empty: ❌ Could not restore message %d: text is empty
restore.admin_notify:
🔄 Message from %s restored by %s
🔗 Restored message: %s
notbad.reason: Message marked as not a violation
notbad.admin_notify: ✅ Message from %s marked as not a violation by %s
notbad.confirm: ✅ Message from %s marked as not a violation
filter.content_removed: [Message is not saved: content violates rules]
admin.username_reuse_alert:
⚠️ Username reuse detected

A new user @%s (%s, id %d) just started writing — but this @username was previously used by one or more different accounts:
%s

This may be a deleted-and-re-registered account. Past moderation history and AI behavior profiles are tied to the old user_id and will NOT carry over.
ai.creative_reply_with_quote:
User replied to this message: "%s"

And quoted the following text:
"%s"

%s
ai.context_reply_chain: Reply chain context (from oldest to newest):
ai.context_adjacent_messages: Other nearby messages from chain participants:
ai.context_user_messages: Recent messages from this user for context:
ai.daily_summary_quiet: 📊 It was quite quiet in the chat today. There were practically no discussions.
ai.vision_no_description: Image cannot be described and contains no text
